---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed change

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you discarded them.

## Impact on the pipeline

Does this affect any of the load-bearing invariants? Please note if so:

- The active fusion contract (`2048 + 32 + 28 = 2108`)
- The `adjacent_cache` pairing required by Phase 3 / Phase 4
- The fake-positive label convention (`fake = 1`)
- Training phase ordering or checkpoint compatibility

## Additional context

Anything else — references, papers, related datasets, etc.
